Is the treatment safe?

Cureskin treatments are designed to be safe and effective, as they are personalized by dermatologists based on your specific skin or hair concerns. The products are clinically tested and formulated to be gentle, even for sensitive skin. However, some individuals may experience mild side effects as their skin adjusts to the treatment, such as dryness or purging. If you have any concerns or experience discomfort, you can reach out to your dermatologist through the app for guidance.

What is my skin type

You can determine your skin type by doing a simple test at home. Wash your face with a gentle cleanser and leave it bare for about 30 minutes. 

- If your skin feels oily or looks shiny, you may have oily skin.
- If it feels tight or dry, you may have dry skin.
- If some areas are oily (usually the T-zone) and others are dry, you may have combination skin.
- If your skin feels comfortable without excess oil or dryness, it is likely normal.

For a more personalized routine, consider completing the skin analysis on the Cureskin app, where your concerns will be reviewed, and a suitable care plan will be recommended based on your skin needs.

Mujhe koi achhi diet plan karde jise mera rang saaf ho matlab ke gora ho

Aapke rang ko saaf karne ke liye ek achhi diet plan mein kuch khaas khane ki cheezein shamil honi chahiye. Yahan kuch sujhav hain:

1. **Fruits & Vegetables**: Berries, oranges, spinach, aur kale jaise phal aur sabziyan vitamins aur antioxidants se bhari hoti hain, jo skin health ke liye achhi hoti hain.
2. **Healthy Fats**: Avocados, nuts, aur seeds ko shamil karein, jo skin ko moisturized rakhte hain.
3. **Omega-3 Fatty Acids**: Salmon, chia seeds, aur flaxseeds mein paye jaate hain, jo inflammation ko kam karne mein madadgar hote hain.
4. **Whole Grains**: Brown rice, quinoa, aur oats ko apne diet mein shamil karein, jo healthy skin ko maintain karne mein madad karte hain.
5. **Hydration**: Din bhar mein kaafi paani piyein taaki aapki skin hydrated rahe.

Iske alawa, ek balanced diet ke saath skincare regimen bhi zaroori hai taaki aapko behtar results mil sakein.

Agar aapki skin oily mehsoos hoti hai ya chamak rahi hai, to aapki skin oily hai. Agar skin tight ya dry mehsoos hoti hai, to aapki skin dry hai. Skin tyepe

To determine your skin type, you can perform a simple test at home. Wash your face with a gentle cleanser and leave it bare for about 30 minutes. 

- If your skin feels oily or looks shiny, you may have oily skin.
- If it feels tight or dry, you may have dry skin.
- If some areas are oily (usually the T-zone) and others are dry, you may have combination skin.
- If your skin feels comfortable without excess oil or dryness, it is likely normal.

For a more personalized routine, consider completing the skin analysis on the Cureskin app, where your concerns will be reviewed, and a suitable care plan will be recommended based on your skin needs.

What is my skin type

You can determine your skin type by doing a simple test at home. Wash your face with a gentle cleanser and leave it bare for about 30 minutes. 

- If your skin feels oily or looks shiny, you may have oily skin.
- If it feels tight or dry, you may have dry skin.
- If some areas are oily (usually the T-zone) and others are dry, you may have combination skin.
- If your skin feels comfortable without excess oil or dryness, it is likely normal.

For a more personalized routine, consider completing the skin analysis on the Cureskin app, where your concerns will be reviewed, and a suitable care plan will be recommended based on your skin needs.

Spf 50

**SPF 50 Aqua Sunscreen** के मुख्य इंग्रीडिएंट्स निम्नलिखित हैं:

1. **Zinc Oxide**: यह एक भौतिक सनस्क्रीन है जो UVA (बुजुर्ग) और UVB (जलन) किरणों से सुरक्षा प्रदान करता है।
2. **Titanium Dioxide**: यह भी एक भौतिक सनस्क्रीन है जो त्वचा को सूरज की हानिकारक किरणों से बचाता है।
3. **Water-based Formula**: यह हल्का और तेजी से अवशोषित होने वाला फॉर्मूला है, जो मेकअप के साथ भी उपयोग के लिए उपयुक्त है।

यह सनस्क्रीन बिना सफेद धब्बे के सुरक्षा प्रदान करता है और त्वचा को हाइड्रेटेड रखने में मदद करता है। इसे सुबह फेस वॉश के बाद इस्तेमाल करने की सलाह दी जाती है।
Barrier Restructure

**Barrier Restructure Cream** के मुख्य इंग्रीडिएंट्स निम्नलिखित हैं:

1. **Bisabolol**: यह त्वचा को शांत करता है और सूजन को कम करने में मदद करता है।
2. **Oat Bran Extract**: यह त्वचा को हाइड्रेट करता है और उसकी सुरक्षा को बढ़ाता है।
3. **Ceramide Complex**: यह त्वचा की बाधा को मजबूत करता है और नमी को लॉक करने में मदद करता है।

यह क्रीम सूखी और damaged त्वचा के लिए उपयुक्त है और इसे सुबह फेस वॉश के बाद पूरे चेहरे और गर्दन पर लगाने की सलाह दी जाती है।
Glyco clear

**Glyco Clear Cream** के मुख्य इंग्रीडिएंट्स निम्नलिखित हैं:

1. **Glycolic Acid**: यह एक एएचए (अल्फा हाइड्रॉक्सी एसिड) है, जो त्वचा की सतह से मृत कोशिकाओं को हटाने में मदद करता है और त्वचा के टेक्सचर को सुधारता है।
2. **Amino Acids**: ये त्वचा को पोषण देते हैं और उसकी हाइड्रेशन को बनाए रखते हैं।
3. **Prebiotics**: ये त्वचा की प्राकृतिक बैक्टीरिया संतुलन को बनाए रखने में मदद करते हैं, जिससे त्वचा स्वस्थ रहती है।

यह क्रीम दाग-धब्बों, स्कार्स और पिगमेंटेशन को हल्का करने में मदद करती है और त्वचा के टेक्सचर को सुधारती है। इसे मंगलवार, गुरुवार और शनिवार को रात में लगाने की सलाह दी जाती है।
Vitamin boost mask

**Vitamin Boost Mask** के मुख्य इंग्रीडिएंट्स निम्नलिखित हैं:

1. **Niacinamide**: यह त्वचा की चमक को बढ़ाता है और त्वचा की बाधा को मजबूत करता है।
2. **Ethyl Ascorbic Acid**: यह एक स्थिर रूप है जो विटामिन C के समान कार्य करता है, त्वचा को उज्ज्वल और हाइड्रेटेड रखने में मदद करता है।
3. **Mandelic Acid**: यह एक एएचए है जो त्वचा के टेक्सचर को सुधारने और दाग-धब्बों को हल्का करने में मदद करता है।

I have facial hair on my face

Facial hair can be managed through several methods, depending on your skin type and sensitivity. Here are some options:

1. **Threading**: This method is good for shaping areas like eyebrows but may cause redness or irritation if you have sensitive skin.
2. **Shaving**: A quick and painless option. Use a gentle facial razor and shave in the direction of hair growth. It’s safe and does not make hair grow thicker.
3. **Laser Hair Removal (LHR)**: This is a safe and effective long-term solution for reducing facial hair, usually requiring monthly or bi-monthly sessions. If hormonal imbalance is a factor, treating it alongside LHR can yield the best results.

For a proper evaluation and safe treatment, it's best to consult a dermatologist.

Chehre per bhi bahut Bal aate Hain

Chehre par bal aane ki samasya ke liye, aapke liye kuch surakshit vikalp hain:

1. **Threading**: Yeh eyebrows jaise kshetron ko shape dene ke liye achha hai, lekin agar aapki skin sensitive hai to yeh redness ya irritation kar sakta hai.
   
2. **Shaving**: Yeh ek tezi se hone wala aur bina dard ka tareeqa hai. Aapko ek gentle facial razor ka istemal karna chahiye aur hair growth ki disha mein shave karna chahiye. Yeh surakshit hai jab sahi tareeke se kiya jaye aur yeh baalon ko moti nahi banata.

3. **Laser Hair Removal (LHR)**: Yeh ek surakshit aur prabhavi tareeqa hai jo lambey samay tak facial hair ko kam karne mein madad karta hai. Iske liye mahine ya do mahine ke sessions ki zaroorat hoti hai.

Agar aapka facial hair hormonal imbalance ki wajah se hai, to hormones ka ilaj karna LHR ke saath milkar behtar parinaam de sakta hai. Iske liye, dermatologist se salah lena behtar hoga.
Mere chik per bhi bahut Bal aate Hain

1. **Threading**: Yeh ek achha tareeqa hai, lekin agar aapki skin sensitive hai to yeh redness ya irritation kar sakta hai.
   
2. **Shaving**: Yeh ek tezi se hone wala aur bina dard ka tareeqa hai. Aapko ek gentle facial razor ka istemal karna chahiye aur hair growth ki disha mein shave karna chahiye. Yeh surakshit hai jab sahi tareeke se kiya jaye.

3. **Laser Hair Removal (LHR)**: Yeh ek surakshit aur prabhavi tareeqa hai jo lambey samay tak facial hair ko kam karne mein madad karta hai. Iske liye mahine ya do mahine ke sessions ki zaroorat hoti hai.

Agar aapka facial hair hormonal imbalance ki wajah se hai, to hormones ka ilaj karna LHR ke saath milkar behtar parinaam de sakta hai. Iske liye, dermatologist se salah lena behtar hoga.
Mem chehre par koi fayda hoga ya nhi

Chehre par bal hataane se aapko kuch fayde ho sakte hain:

1. **Aakarshan**: Facial hair ko hataane se aapka chehra zyada saaf aur aakarshak dikh sakta hai.
   
2. **Self-Confidence**: Facial hair ko hataane se aapki self-esteem aur confidence mein sudhaar ho sakta hai, kyunki aap apne chehre ko behtar mehsoos karte hain.

3. **Smooth Skin**: Hair removal se aapki skin smooth aur soft ho sakti hai, jo makeup lagane par bhi behtar dikhai deti hai.

4. **Long-Term Solutions**: Laser Hair Removal (LHR) jaise treatments se aapko lambey samay tak facial hair se chutkaara mil sakta hai, jo aapke liye ek sustainable solution ho sakta hai. 

Agar aapko is vishay mein aur jaankari chahiye, to dermatologist se salah lena behtar hoga.

1. **Fruits & Vegetables**: Include a variety of colorful fruits and vegetables rich in vitamins and antioxidants, such as berries, oranges, spinach, and kale.
2. **Healthy Fats**: Incorporate sources of healthy fats like avocados, nuts, and seeds to keep your skin moisturized.
3. **Omega-3 Fatty Acids**: Consume fish like salmon, chia seeds, and flaxseeds to help reduce inflammation.
4. **Whole Grains**: Opt for whole grains like brown rice, quinoa, and oats for overall skin health.

What is my skin type

You can determine your skin type by doing a simple test at home. Wash your face with a gentle cleanser and leave it bare for about 30 minutes. 

- If your skin feels oily or looks shiny, you may have oily skin.
- If it feels tight or dry, you may have dry skin.
- If some areas are oily (usually the T-zone) and others are dry, you may have combination skin.
- If your skin feels comfortable without excess oil or dryness, it is likely normal.

For a more personalized routine, consider completing the skin analysis on the Cureskin app, where your concerns will be reviewed, and a suitable care plan will be recommended based on your skin needs.

I want even skin tone , glowing skin, and tight skin

To achieve an even skin tone, glowing skin, and tighter skin, Cureskin offers several products that can help with these concerns:

1. **Even Skin Tone**: The Multi Active Corrector and TXA Clear Cream are designed to promote an even skin tone by reducing dark spots and pigmentation.

2. **Glowing Skin**: The Vitamin-C NanoGold Serum and Vitamin Boost Mask can enhance skin radiance and support a brighter complexion.

3. **Tighter Skin**: The Collagen Boost Serum helps improve skin elasticity and firmness, which can contribute to a tighter appearance.

For the best results, it's recommended to consult your Cureskin dermatologist to tailor a regimen that suits your specific skin type and concerns.
This things are in my kit

You can find complete details on how to use your products in the “How to Use” section of the Cureskin app. This section provides step-by-step guidance on the amount to apply, when to use each product, and the correct order of application.

I want my treatment from start

To start your treatment with Cureskin, you need to follow these steps:

1. **Initial Assessment**: Use the Cureskin app to share details about your skin or hair concerns, including uploading clear photos. You may also need to answer questions about your lifestyle and history to help identify the root cause of your issues.

2. **AI-Powered Analysis**: The app's AI will analyze your photos and provide a report on your skin or hair condition. Based on this analysis, a personalized treatment plan will be created and reviewed by a dermatologist.

3. **Receive Your Kit**: Once your treatment plan is ready, you will receive a personalized treatment kit with step-by-step instructions on how to use each product.

4. **Monthly Follow-Ups**: After starting your treatment, you will have regular check-ups with your dermatologist to monitor your progress and make any necessary adjustments.

If you have any questions or need assistance during the process, feel free to reach out to your Cureskin dermatologist through the app or call 81500 96500.
But I have more skin problem

If you have multiple skin problems, Cureskin can help address them step by step. Your dermatologist will prioritize the most severe concern first and guide you through the treatment of each issue until all your skin concerns are managed. 

It's important to follow your personalized regimen consistently and attend monthly check-ups with your dermatologist to monitor your progress and make any necessary adjustments. If you have specific concerns or need additional support, feel free to reach out to your Cureskin dermatologist through the app or call 81500 96500 for assistance.
How it helps my skin

Cureskin helps your skin by providing a personalized treatment plan tailored to your specific concerns. Here’s how it works:

1. **Personalized Regimen**: Each treatment plan is designed by dermatologists based on your skin type and issues, ensuring that the products work together effectively.

Mere face per Bal bahut hai

Facial hair can be managed through several methods. You can consider threading, which is good for shaping areas like eyebrows but may cause irritation for sensitive skin. Shaving is another quick and painless option; just use a gentle facial razor and shave in the direction of hair growth. For a more long-term solution, laser hair removal (LHR) is effective, typically requiring monthly or bi-monthly sessions. If your facial hair is due to hormonal imbalances, addressing those alongside LHR can yield the best results. It's advisable to consult a dermatologist for a proper evaluation and safe treatment.
Hindi mein bataen

Aapke chehre par baalon ko hataane ke liye kuch surakshit vikalp hain:

1. **Threading**: Ye eyebrows jaise kshetron ko shape dene ke liye achha hai, lekin agar aapki skin sensitive hai to ye redness ya irritation kar sakta hai.

2. **Shaving**: Ye ek tezi se aur bina dard ke hone wala vikalp hai. Aapko ek gentle facial razor ka istemal karna chahiye aur baalon ki growth ki disha mein shave karna chahiye. Ye surakshit hai aur isse baal motay nahi hote.

3. **Laser Hair Removal (LHR)**: Ye ek surakshit aur prabhavi tareeka hai jo lambey samay tak facial hair ko kam karne mein madad karta hai. Iske liye aam taur par mahine mein ya do mahine mein sessions ki zaroorat hoti hai.

Agar aapke facial hair ka karan hormonal imbalance hai, to LHR ke saath hormones ka ilaj karna behtar parinaam de sakta hai. Sahi evaluation aur surakshit treatment ke liye dermatologist se salah lena behtar hai.

Andogenetic alopecia

Androgenetic alopecia, commonly known as male or female pattern baldness, is a condition characterized by hair loss that typically follows a specific pattern. Cureskin offers treatments for hair loss, including the Grow Pro Hair F1 Tablets, which are designed to treat hair loss in men and are suitable for early stages of male pattern baldness. These tablets work as a low-strength 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor, helping to slow down the balding process and support regrowth with continued use.

For personalized treatment options, it's best to consult your Cureskin dermatologist through the app or call 81500 96500 for guidance tailored to your specific needs.

Is it melasma or pigmentation?

Melasma and pigmentation are related but distinct skin concerns. Melasma is a specific type of pigmentation that typically appears as brown or gray-brown patches on the skin, often triggered by hormonal changes, sun exposure, or certain medications. On the other hand, pigmentation refers to a broader category that includes various types of skin discoloration, such as dark spots or uneven skin tone.

Cureskin treats both melasma and general pigmentation, and with consistent treatment and care, significant fading can often be achieved. However, some deeper or recurring types may require longer maintenance. It's best to consult with a Cureskin dermatologist for a personalized assessment and treatment plan tailored to your specific needs.

आप अपने चेहरे पर बर्फ लगा सकती हैं, लेकिन इसे सावधानी से करना चाहिए। बर्फ लगाने के कुछ लाभ हैं, जैसे:

1. **सूजन कम करना**: बर्फ लगाने से सूजन और लालिमा कम हो सकती है।
2. **पोरों को सिकोड़ना**: यह त्वचा के पोर्स को सिकोड़ने में मदद कर सकता है, जिससे त्वचा अधिक टाइट और चिकनी लगती है।
3. **रक्त संचार बढ़ाना**: बर्फ लगाने से रक्त संचार में सुधार हो सकता है, जिससे त्वचा को ताजगी मिलती है।

हालांकि, बर्फ को सीधे त्वचा पर लगाने से पहले, इसे एक कपड़े में लपेटना बेहतर होता है ताकि त्वचा को ठंड से नुकसान न पहुंचे। इसे 10-15 मिनट के लिए लगाना ठीक रहेगा। 

यदि आपकी त्वचा संवेदनशील है या आपको कोई समस्या है, तो पहले अपने डॉक्टर से सलाह लेना बेहतर होगा.

Me abhi simple face wash use krti hu

Aapke liye best face wash aapki skin type aur concerns par depend karta hai. Cureskin mein humare paas teen face wash options hain:

1. **Deep Cleanse Face Wash**: Oily skin ke liye, jo excess oil control karta hai aur skin ko pollution se protect karta hai.
2. **Sensitive Pro Cleanser**: Extremely sensitive skin ke liye, jo gently oil aur dirt ko remove karta hai bina dryness ya irritation ke.
3. **Gentle Cleanse Face Wash**: Dry aur combination skin ke liye, jo skin ko cleanse karte hue moisture balance maintain karta hai.

Aapka recommended face wash aapki skin type ke hisaab se best suited hai.
Meri skin kesi hai oily,dry ya combination

Aap apni skin type jaanne ke liye ek simple test ghar par kar sakti hain. Apne chehre ko ek gentle cleanser se dhoye aur 30 minutes ke liye bina kisi product ke chhod de. 

- Agar aapki skin oily ya shiny mehsoos hoti hai, toh aapki skin oily hai.
- Agar skin tight ya dry mehsoos hoti hai, toh aapki skin dry hai.
- Agar kuch areas oily hain (usually T-zone) aur kuch dry hain, toh aapki skin combination hai.
- Agar skin comfortable hai bina excess oil ya dryness ke, toh aapki skin normal hai. 

Agar aapko personalized routine chahiye, toh Cureskin app par skin analysis complete karein.

Also iam having facial hair how to get rid of it

Facial hair removal can be approached in several safe ways, depending on your skin type and sensitivity:

1. **Threading**: This method is good for shaping areas like eyebrows but may cause redness or irritation if your skin is sensitive or acne-prone.
   
2. **Shaving**: A quick and painless option. Use a gentle facial razor and shave in the direction of hair growth. It's safe and does not make hair grow thicker.

3. **Laser Hair Removal (LHR)**: This is a safe and effective long-term solution for reducing facial hair, typically requiring monthly or bi-monthly sessions. If your facial hair is due to hormonal imbalance, treating the hormones alongside LHR can yield the best results.

For a proper evaluation and safe treatment, it's best to consult a dermatologist.
I need any cream to stop it

What is my skin type?

You can determine your skin type by doing a simple test at home. Wash your face with a gentle cleanser and leave it bare for about 30 minutes. 

- If your skin feels oily or looks shiny, you may have oily skin.
- If it feels tight or dry, you may have dry skin.
- If some areas are oily (usually the T-zone) and others are dry, you may have combination skin.
- If your skin feels comfortable without excess oil or dryness, it is likely normal.

For a more personalized routine, consider completing the skin analysis on the Cureskin app, where your concerns will be reviewed, and a suitable care plan will be recommended based on your skin needs.

Healthy diet plan

A healthy diet is essential for maintaining clear skin and overall well-being. Here are some dietary recommendations to support skin health:

1. **Fruits & Vegetables**: Incorporate a variety of fruits and vegetables, especially berries, oranges, spinach, and kale, which are rich in vitamins and antioxidants.
2. **Healthy Fats**: Include sources of healthy fats like avocados, nuts, and seeds to keep your skin moisturized.
3. **Omega-3 Fatty Acids**: Foods like salmon, chia seeds, and flaxseeds help reduce inflammation.
4. **Whole Grains**: Opt for brown rice, quinoa, and oats to maintain healthy skin.
5. **Hydration**: Drink plenty of water to keep your skin hydrated from the inside.

While following a balanced diet can significantly improve your skin health, it should complement your skincare regimen for optimal results.

Skin shine cream ke kya fayda hai

Skin shine cream ke fayde hain:

1. **Dull Skin Ko Bright Karna**: Ye cream dull skin ko bright karne mein madad karti hai, jisse aapka chehra zyada chamakdaar dikhai deta hai.
2. **Skin Tone Aur Texture Ko Improve Karna**: Ye cream overall skin tone aur texture ko behtar banane mein bhi madadgar hoti hai, jisse aapki skin zyada healthy aur radiant lagti hai.
3. **Dark Spots Aur Pigmentation Ko Kam Karna**: Is cream ka istemal dark spots aur pigmentation ko kam karne ke liye bhi kiya ja sakta hai, jisse aapki skin aur bhi even-toned hoti hai.

Agar aapko specific product ya regimen ki zaroorat hai, toh aap apne Cureskin doctor se consult kar sakte hain.
Pigmentation ka kya matlab hai

Pigmentation ka matlab hai skin mein rang ka badlav ya dark spots ka hona. Ye aksar melanin ke zyada production ki wajah se hota hai, jo skin ko rang deta hai. Pigmentation ke kai types hote hain, jaise ki sun spots, freckles, aur melasma. 

Iska treatment karne ke liye, Cureskin personalized regimens offer karta hai jo pigmentation ko kam karne mein madadgar hote hain. Dermatologists aapki skin ko assess karke sabse effective treatment plan tayar karte hain.
Pigmentation ko hindi me kya bolte hai

Pigmentation ko Hindi mein "रंगत" ya "रंग परिवर्तन" kehte hain. Ye skin mein rang ka badlav ya dark spots ka hona darshata hai. Agar aapko iske treatment ya management ke liye madad chahiye, toh aap apne Cureskin doctor se consult kar sakte hain.
Mujhe bhut acne h

Agar aapko bhut acne hai, toh Cureskin ka personalized regimen aapki madad kar sakta hai. Aapko apne skin ko saaf rakhne ke liye gentle cleanser ka istemal karna chahiye, aur acne treatment products jaise ki salicylic acid ya benzoyl peroxide apply karna chahiye. Moisturizer ka istemal bhi zaroori hai, lekin ensure karein ki wo non-comedogenic ho, taaki wo pores ko clog na kare.

Aapko daily sunscreen bhi lagana chahiye, kyunki yeh aapki skin ko sun damage se bachata hai. Cureskin ke doctors aapko monthly follow-ups ke zariye aapki progress track karne mein madad karenge, taaki aapko best results mil sake. Agar aapko koi specific concerns hain, toh aap apne Cureskin doctor se baat kar sakte hain.
Mujhe kya kya fruits khane chahiye

Aapko acne ke liye kuch specific fruits khane chahiye jo aapki skin health ko support karte hain. Yahan kuch fruits hain jo aap apne diet mein shamil kar sakte hain:

1. **Berries**: Jaise ki strawberries, blueberries, aur raspberries, yeh antioxidants se bhare hote hain jo skin ko rejuvenate karte hain.
2. **Oranges**: Vitamin C se rich, yeh skin ko bright aur healthy rakhne mein madadgar hote hain.
3. **Apples**: Yeh fiber aur antioxidants ka achha source hain, jo skin health ko support karte hain.
4. **Bananas**: Yeh potassium aur vitamins se bhare hote hain, jo skin ko moisturize karne mein madad karte hain.

In fruits ko apne daily diet mein shamil karne se aapki skin health mein sudhar ho sakta hai. Saath hi, hydration par bhi dhyan dena zaroori hai, isliye paani kaafi piyein.
Orange  harmful to nhi h mere liye

Oranges aapke liye harmful nahi hain. Yeh vitamin C se rich hote hain, jo skin health ke liye beneficial hai aur antioxidants provide karte hain. Aap inhe apne diet mein shamil kar sakte hain, lekin agar aapko kisi specific allergy ya sensitivity hai, toh aapko apne doctor se consult karna chahiye.
M curd aur milk le skti hoo

Aap curd aur milk le sakti hain, kyunki yeh dairy products aapki skin health ke liye beneficial hote hain. Curd mein probiotics hote hain jo digestion ko improve karte hain aur skin ko healthy rakhne mein madad karte hain. Milk bhi calcium aur vitamins ka achha source hai, jo skin ko nourish karte hain. 

Lekin, agar aapko dairy se koi allergy ya sensitivity hai, toh aapko apne doctor se consult karna chahiye.
